title: Simply Swords + Weapon Back Slot Fix
description: This Resource pack fixes weapons from the mod Simply Swords working with the mod Back Weapon Slot(Forge)
body:
This Resource pack fixes weapons from the mod Simply Swords working with the mod Back Weapon Slot(Forge) Currently the 2.0 file is marked as 1.20.1 but should work on other versions.

:DISCLAIMER:

Version 2.0 was made for the current(April 14, 2026) version Simply Swords(v1.56.0)
Version 1.0 is still available but will be missing some weapons.
